category_sources: source_facts.description says osctrl-cli is fast and efficient osquery management; official osctrl.net describes osctrl as an osquery management solution for monitoring nodes, distributing configuration, collecting logs, and running on-demand queries.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide osctrl-cli; official osctrl.net navigation has an osctrl-cli usage section.
docs_sources: Official osctrl.net site contains component, deployment, configuration, and usage documentation, including osctrl-cli commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/jmpsec/osctrl; per instruction repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists osctrl-cli; source_facts.description and official osctrl.net describe osquery management, monitoring nodes, distributing configuration, and collecting logs.
